[[File:Armadyl crossbow (Last Man Standing) detail.png|left|150px]]
The '''Armadyl crossbow''' from [[Last Man Standing]] is a minigame-exclusive variant of the normal [[armadyl crossbow]]. It can be obtained (along with 5,000 [[Opal dragon bolts (e) (Last Man Standing)|opal dragon bolts (e)]]) from opening the [[Chest (Last Man Standing)|chests]] with a [[bloody key]] or [[bloodier key]], or looting the [[Crate (Last Man Standing)|crates]] that spawn at random locations on the map. It is dropped on death to whoever killed you.

The crossbow has an [[attack range]] of 8, and the longrange combat style will increase it by 2.

==Special attack==
The Armadyl crossbow has a [[special attack]], ''Armadyl Eye'', which consumes 50% of the player's special attack energy. Armadyl Eye will, for one shot, doubles the player's overall accuracy (level + gear accuracy), as well as the chance of an [[enchanted bolt]]'s special effect to occur.

For example, when performing the special attack with [[diamond bolts (e)|enchanted diamond bolts]], the bolt's special effect, ''Armour Piercing'', would have a 20% chance of activating instead of 10%. If the [[Hard Kandarin Diary]] has been completed, the chance of activating for that shot is increased from 11% to 21%.
